title: Login Issue
description: Customer is unable to log into the account after resetting the password. They keep receiving an error message during login attempts.

title: Payment Failure - Transaction pending
description: Payment for the last order did not go through successfully. Customer’s bank account shows a pending transaction.

title: Shipping Delay
description: The package has not arrived even after 7 days of dispatch. Customer is concerned about the delivery status.

title: Refund Request
description: Customer requested a refund due to receiving a defective product. They also asked for an update on the refund timeline.

title: Feature Inquiry
description: Customer wants to know if a bulk order feature is available in the system. They are considering placing a large order next month.

title: Password Reset Not Working
description: Customer tried resetting the password but the link has expired. They need assistance generating a new reset link.

title: Account Locked
description: Customer’s account was locked after multiple failed login attempts. They need the support team to unlock it.

title: Order Cancellation
description: Customer requested cancellation of an order placed by mistake. They also want confirmation that payment will be refunded.

title: App Crash
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening. Customer is unable to use any of the features properly.

title: Subscription Inquiry
description: Customer wants to know details about premium subscription plans. They also asked if there is a student discount available.

title: Email Not Received
description: Customer did not receive the order confirmation email. They have checked the spam folder but nothing is there.

title: Wrong Item Delivered
description: Customer received the wrong product in their shipment. They are requesting an exchange or refund as soon as possible.

title: App Slow Performance
description: Customer reported that the app is taking too long to load pages. They also noticed frequent lag during checkout.

title: Discount Code Not Applied
description: Customer tried applying a discount code during checkout but it did not work. They want to know if the code is still valid.
